settingsUnavailableDescription: We could not load workspace settings right now. Refresh or try again shortly.
settingsNoDataDescription: No workspace settings data was returned for this workspace.
noConfigurableSettings: This section has no configurable settings.
teamMemberRightsDescription: Access and visibility rights for team members
whoCanCreateProjectsAndClients: Who can create projects and clients
projectAndBillingDefaultsDescription: How new projects and billing will be set up by default if not defined otherwise
setNewProjectsAsBillableByDefault: Set new projects as "billable" by default
setNewProjectsAsPublicByDefault: Set new projects as "public" by default
limitPublicProjectsDataInReportsToAdmins: Limit public projects data in reports to admins
enforceBillableTimeEntriesOnBillableProj: Enforce billable time entries on billable projects
timeEntryAndTimesheetRestrictionsDescrip: Set rules to make sure your reports or timesheets are always orderly
setRequiredFieldsForNewTimeEntries: Set required fields for new Time entries
setRequiredFieldsDescription: Setting required fields helps to ensure your team fills in all the information you need for accurate reporting
lockTimeEntriesDescription: This allows to lock existing Time entries and prevent creating new ones before selected date
timeEntrySettingsDescription: Define the default approach your team should use to log time. You can opt for simplicity with 'Hide start and end times' mode or choose 'Show start and end times' for detailed time logs with start and end times.
timesheetViewSettingsDescription: Choose how you and your team manage time entries. Opt for the effortless way of handling and viewing them with the Timesheet View.
reportingDescription: Choose how data is presented to simplify the analysis of tracked time
collapseSmallEntriesInPdfExports: Collapse small entries in PDF exports
collapseSmallEntriesDescription: Entries that take less than 2% of the donut chart will be included in the "Other" category
needHelpMakingTogglFitYourTeam: Need help making Toggl Track fit your team's needs?
reloadAfterWorkspaceSettingsRecover: Reload after the workspace settings service recovers. Existing project, member, and private-access rules stay unchanged until this page can fetch the current policy.
permissionConfigurationDescription: Keep admin-only creation, dashboard visibility, and public project exposure aligned with the current workspace access policy.
restrictProjectCreationToWorkspaceAdmins: Restrict project creation to workspace admins.
restrictTagCreationToWorkspaceAdmins: Restrict tag creation to workspace admins.
hideTeamDashboardFromNonAdminMembers: Hide the team dashboard from non-admin members.
limitPublicProjectDataInReportsToAdmins: Limit public project data in reports to admins.
overviewOfRecentWorkspaceUsage: Overview of recent workspace usage and member activity.
couldNotLoadActivityData: Could not load activity data. Try again later.
noMemberActivityDataAvailableYet: No member activity data available yet.
exportWorkspaceDataAsZip: Export workspace data as a ZIP archive.
exportFailedCouldNotDownloadArchive: Export failed: could not download archive
downloadTimeEntriesForDateRange: Download your workspace time entries for a selected date range.
organizationSettingsUnavailableDescripti: We could not load organization settings right now. Refresh or try again shortly.
organizationSettingsNoData: No organization settings data was returned for this organization.
deleteOrganizationDescription: Permanently delete this organization and all its workspaces, projects, time entries, and data. This action cannot be undone.
